title: gilia australis
intro: Gilia australis, also known as Australian gilia, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gilia australis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be dried and used as a powder or capsule in herbal supplements.
